summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a solid but not spectacular performance.
review: The matrix source provides crystal‑clear sound that reviewers love, and the setlist is praised as good. While the playing is described as steady and well‑executed, it lacks the inspiration of adjacent shows, leaving the overall musical impression mixed. Nonetheless, the audio quality more than makes up for the modest performance.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviewers commend the excellent sound (recording quality high) while opinions on the playing vary from well‑played to merely steady, leading to a solid but not stellar overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers note crisp and excellent sound with no reported issues; matrix blend provides both clarity and ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Good set list; performance described as steady and well‑played but not especially inspired, especially when compared to the following night.
